大发计划群分析总结【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239218336_64873842<br>vk.com/topic-239142191_66212634<br>vk.com/topic-239149373_64720364<br>vk.com/topic-239142180_65617532<br>vk.com/topic-239183356_64873845<br>vk.com/topic-239183295_64468418<br>vk.com/topic-239183501_66212635<br>vk.com/topic-239149392_65162527<br>vk.com/topic-239183445_64468419<br>vk.com/topic-239183370_65617534<br>vk.com/topic-239218585_64468421<br>vk.com/topic-239153627_65996004<br>vk.com/topic-239212675_64468420<br>vk.com/topic-239199493_64720367<br>vk.com/topic-239149138_65063273<br>vk.com/topic-239218431_66212637<br>vk.com/topic-239218529_65343351<br>vk.com/topic-239149243_64720368<br>vk.com/topic-239213532_65162529<br>vk.com/topic-239142179_65343352<br>vk.com/topic-239199830_65617535<br>vk.com/topic-239183217_65996006<br>vk.com/topic-239149152_65162530<br>vk.com/topic-239183374_64550134<br>vk.com/topic-239218433_64720369<br>vk.com/topic-239183516_64873850<br>vk.com/topic-239149215_64468423<br>vk.com/topic-239226536_64873851<br>vk.com/topic-239182931_66212639<br>vk.com/topic-239218406_64873852<br>vk.com/topic-239153610_65617537<br>vk.com/topic-239218352_65162535<br>vk.com/topic-239149249_65343353<br>vk.com/top
